title: Feature Request : Option to Configure a Default Board or Workspace when you login
excerpt:
an option to configure the default board or workspace when you login to your monday.com account 
this would be a useful feature

posts.author: Guruprasad_Shenoy (Guruprasad Shenoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
an option to configure the default board or workspace when you login to your monday.com account
this would be a useful feature

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Guruprasad_Shenoy!

This is dependent on what plan you’re on but if you’re on our Enterprise plan, the Admin has the ability to set a default dashboard when logging into your account:

Screen Shot 2023-02-22 at 1.31.06 pm1350×1094 101 KB

I recognise this isn’t the same for all plans so take this suggestion on board

posts.author: Guruprasad_Shenoy (Guruprasad Shenoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BiancaT ,

the above mentioned configuration is only valid for dashboards , i was looking for an option to set bords as default

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Understood @Guruprasad_Shenoy, I have passed your feedback to our team! I thought I’d mention this alternative incase it worked for you in the meantime

posts.author: Guruprasad_Shenoy (Guruprasad Shenoy)
posts.cookedHtml: sure, Thank you for the alternative option @BiancaT

posts.author: Hezibo (Hezi Bosmi)
posts.cookedHtml: If you use monday.com on a browser you can bookmark the requested board.
